Author: dajoey
Name: Armoire Auto-Fill (Testing)
Punchline: TESTING — armoire gear tracker rewrite (Cabinet + LuminaSupplemental data)
Description: TESTING build. Lists every armoire-eligible item in the game and shows whether each is in your inventory, in your armoire, or missing. Will be replaced by the non-testing build once verified.
Changelog: v0.2.5 (testing) - Three real fixes from in-game testing. (1) Scan equipped gear + saddlebag/premium saddlebag containers in addition to inventory bags and armory chest — DT healer gear shows up if you're wearing it. (2) Cabinet observer: ItemFinderModule's bitmap is only 4000 bits (FixedSizeArray125<uint>) but the Cabinet sheet has ~4900 rows in Dawntrail; DT items live past row 4000 and were invisible. Re-hook the Cabinet+MiragePrismPrismBox addon-lifecycle events and snapshot via the live UIState.Cabinet.IsItemInCabinet API once the armoire UI is opened — that has full coverage. Bitmap stays as the cold-start fallback. (3) Drop the CabinetCategory slot-label fallback that was incorrectly inflating Legs to ~300; items with no EquipSlotCategory now show as Unknown rather than mislabeled. Also: log the full dungeon roster at startup so coverage gaps are visible. v0.2.3 (testing) - Reframed around the goal 'show me what I'm missing from each dungeon'. Drops the 'Source unknown' bucket (~3200 quest/event/vendor items not relevant for dungeon farming). Default view shows missing items only; toggles for Show owned items and Hide completed dungeons. Sort dungeons by level. Fall back to CabinetCategory for slot labels when EquipSlotCategory is empty (fashion accessories etc.). Logs slot distribution at startup so any 'Unknown' regression is visible. v0.2.2 - Fix DungeonChest join: was joining DungeonChestItem.ChestId to DungeonChest.ChestId (in-map position), should join to DungeonChest.RowId (primary key). With the wrong join, ~3000 cabinet items had no known source and only ~12 dungeons populated; this fix should restore the majority of dungeon mappings. Also dedupe summary counts so items dropping in multiple dungeons don't inflate the headline 'X / Y owned' total. v0.2.1 - Fix slot labels (was "Unknown" everywhere; EquipSlotCategory mapping was off-by-two). Switch armoire detection to ItemFinderModule->CabinetItemUnlockBits — no longer need to open the armoire UI; the cabinet cache loads on login. Auto-scan inventory whenever the main window opens or the cabinet snapshot changes. Add per-state ownership counts and last-scan timestamp. Bump LuminaSupplemental.Excel 4.3.1 -> 4.3.3 for newer dungeon drop data.
